nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Boyd Alexander
nodes.summary: Boyd Alexander是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Green longtail、Cameroon olive greenbul、Neumann's starling等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cameroon olive greenbul
nodes.summary: The Cameroon olive greenbul (Phyllastrephus poensis), is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in the Cameroon line (including Bioko). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Alternate names for the Cameroon olive greenbul include Bioko greenbul and Cameroon olive bulbul. References
